series_metadata.series_description: This document is a summary analysis to determine if a system collects personal information, especially confidential personal information. It is required for each information system under OIT Bulletin ITB-2008.02. It does not contain any confidential information.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Until edited or system is no longer active. ; Electronic: Until edited or system is no longer active., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
